methodology: Docker warm container (BATCH-ULTRA-t10-a, port 3262), SwiftShader WebGL. Each screen loaded via named scenario preset or __rrScenario.loadCustom(). Wait >= 5000ms per screen. Captured screenshot.png + layout-dump.txt per screen. Cross-validated dark screenshots against layout dump before flagging.
